satisfied_conditions: Hotel within international rate limit (1,200 CNY/night ≤ 1,500 CNY/night)
Per diem at standard international rate (400 CNY/day)
Receipts attached for flight, hotel, and conference registration
decisions.reason: All policy conditions are satisfied. VP approval obtained for international travel and expenses >5,000 CNY. All expenses are within allowable limits with required receipts attached. No exemptions needed.

unmet_conditions: DPO approval not obtained (required for Confidential data under §2)
DPO pre-approval not obtained (required for bulk export >100 records under §3)
Audit logging not arranged (required for bulk export under §3)
decisions.reason: Bulk export of Confidential data (~50,000 records) requires DPO pre-approval and audit logging under POL-DAT-2025 §3. The requested exemption from DPO pre-approval and audit logging has no basis in policy — §5 provides no business-deadline exemption for Confidential data exports. The underlying export is potentially allowable once DPO approval and audit logging are arranged through normal workflow.
decisions.required_next_action: Requester must obtain DPO pre-approval, arrange audit logging, and secure DPO approval before resubmitting. Exemption request is denied.

satisfied_conditions: Recipient identified (internal to Wang Peng, then to court)
unmet_conditions: Data Processing Agreement (DPA) may be required for third-party sharing with court under §4
applicable_exceptions: POL-DAT-2025 §5: Legal compliance requests (subpoena, court order) may override Confidential data restrictions
decisions.exception_scope: The legal compliance exemption covers Confidential data restrictions normally requiring standalone DPO pre-approval, but does NOT waive the joint Legal + DPO review requirement. Policy explicitly mandates joint review before any override takes effect.
decisions.reason: Policy exemption §5 explicitly requires Legal + DPO joint review for legal compliance requests involving Confidential data. The first-line reviewer cannot approve, reject, or hold this request — it must be transferred to the Legal + DPO joint review authority per policy boundary.
decisions.required_next_action: ESCALATE to Legal + DPO joint review. Determine: (1) subpoena validity and completeness, (2) proportionate export scope, (3) DPA requirement with court, (4) retention/deletion timeline, (5) final approval for encrypted transfer.

satisfied_conditions: Vendor on approved vendor list (AnalyticsPro Inc.)
CEO written approval waives competitive bidding (POL-PRC-2025 §5)
Not a new vendor — third year, no security review needed
unmet_conditions: VP approval pending (required for purchases >10,000 CNY under §2)
Procurement committee review not convened (required for purchases 10,001-50,000 CNY under §2)
CFO approval not obtained (required for purchases >50,000 CNY under §2)
applicable_exceptions: POL-PRC-2025 §5: CEO written approval exempts from competitive bidding
decisions.exception_scope: CEO waiver applies only to competitive bidding requirement. It does not waive VP approval, procurement committee review, or CFO approval — these remain required under their respective threshold tiers.
decisions.reason: Total purchase (53,000 CNY) triggers three approval tiers: VP + procurement committee (10K-50K) and CFO (>50K). CEO waiver covers competitive bidding only. All missing approvals are remediable through normal procurement workflow.
decisions.required_next_action: Requester must obtain: (1) VP approval, (2) convene procurement committee for review, (3) CFO approval. Recommend adding annual review clause to contract given auto-renewal mechanism.
